libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No global environment variable or system property is required. Tests can cover core usage with ConfigLoaderBuilder plus MapPropertySource/addMapSource, .props/.properties resources, command-line sources, and system-property/env-property sources using test-scoped values that are set and cleared inside the test.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: README examples commonly use YAML/JSON/TOML/HOCON files, but those formats require optional hoplite format modules; avoid those unless deliberately adding the matching module.
Local Gradle and Native Image verification remain authoritative for the 3.0.0.RC1 Kotlin/runtime combination.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Meaningful hoplite-core coverage is reachable with the normal scaffold: the artifact brings its required Kotlin/coroutines dependencies transitively and core includes map, system/env, command-line, and .properties sources plus the PropsParser.
